name: carviary
description: Carviary - Quake engine based on TomazQuake

scripts.compile: cmake -S src_sdl3 -B build_sdl3 -A Win32 -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=SDL3-3.2.14 && cmake --build build_sdl3 --config Release && echo Build complete: carviary_sdl3.exe
scripts.compile:legacy: cmake -S src_cpp -B build && cmake --build build --config Release && echo Build complete: carviary.exe
scripts.compile:sdl3: cmake -S src_sdl3 -B build_sdl3 -A Win32 -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=SDL3-3.2.14 && cmake --build build_sdl3 --config Release && echo Build complete: carviary_sdl3.exe
